item.title: A historic object revealed in the mud
item.description: A fascinating discovery reveals an object buried in mud for centuries, offering insight into history, preservation, and the story behind its survival. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: A historic object revealed in the mud
media:content.media:description: A fascinating discovery reveals an object buried in mud for centuries, offering insight into history, preservation, and the story behind its survival. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A Hidden Beach Discovery with Nicola White Tideline Art
item.description: A mudlarking-style discovery on a hidden beach explored with Nicola White, highlighting the find and its possible historical and coastal significance. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: A Hidden Beach Discovery with Nicola White Tideline Art
media:content.media:description: A mudlarking-style discovery on a hidden beach explored with Nicola White, highlighting the find and its possible historical and coastal significance. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Why Are There So Many Pipes by the Thames?
item.description: A look at why so many pipe fragments are found along the River Thames, exploring historical smoking habits, manufacturing, and how these artifacts ended up in the river. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Why Are There So Many Pipes by the Thames?
media:content.media:description: A look at why so many pipe fragments are found along the River Thames, exploring historical smoking habits, manufacturing, and how these artifacts ended up in the river. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Nicola White Tideline Art: Button Cleaning Discovery
item.description: A mudlarking find shared by Nicola White, focusing on the cleaning and restoration of a discovered button and its historical details. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Nicola White Tideline Art: Button Cleaning Discovery
media:content.media:description: A mudlarking find shared by Nicola White, focusing on the cleaning and restoration of a discovered button and its historical details. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Can You Identify This Mystery Coin?
item.description: A look at an unidentified coin find, exploring possible origins, markings, and historical clues as viewers attempt to determine where it came from and its significance. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Can You Identify This Mystery Coin?
media:content.media:description: A look at an unidentified coin find, exploring possible origins, markings, and historical clues as viewers attempt to determine where it came from and its significance. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: The Thames Inspires Nicola White Tideline Art
item.description: A look at how the River Thames inspires creative work and discoveries shared by Nicola White, blending art, mudlarking finds, and historical exploration. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: The Thames Inspires Nicola White Tideline Art
media:content.media:description: A look at how the River Thames inspires creative work and discoveries shared by Nicola White, blending art, mudlarking finds, and historical exploration. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A 3.3 Million-Year-Old Thames Artefact
item.description: An extraordinary archaeological discovery from the Thames, exploring a 3.3-million-year-old artefact and what it reveals about early history and ancient environments. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: A 3.3 Million-Year-Old Thames Artefact
media:content.media:description: An extraordinary archaeological discovery from the Thames, exploring a 3.3-million-year-old artefact and what it reveals about early history and ancient environments. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames
